_doc: Single source of truth for bucket structure. ALL scripts (build-manifest.ts, build-granular-skills.ts, build-llms-txt.ts, generate-domain-skills.py, gap-check.py, sync-public.sh) read from this file. To rename, reorder, or add a bucket, edit here and re-run sync. Order in this file is the canonical display order.

decide.label: Decide
decide.description: Panel for the hard call — mental models, strategy, decision-making under uncertainty.
decide.trigger_use: Use when the question is "should I?" / "how do I think about this?" / "what's the right call?"
decide.named_examples: "ask Munger", "what would Taleb say", "ask Decide with Galef and Helmer"

build.label: Build
build.description: Panel for running the company — founders, operators, organizational design, hiring, culture, product.
build.trigger_use: Use when the question is "how do I run this?" — company, team, product, deal.
build.named_examples: "ask Bezos", "what would Chesky say", "ask Build with Bezos and Musk"

sell.label: Sell
sell.description: Panel for getting and keeping customers — positioning, growth, marketing, customer research.
sell.trigger_use: Use when the question is "how do I get / keep / understand customers?"
sell.named_examples: "ask Dunford", "what would Chen say", "ask Sell with Ries and Verna"

say.label: Say
say.description: Panel for the craft of words — writing, editing, voice, copywriting, comms, PR.
say.trigger_use: Use when the question is "how do I write / pitch / present this?"
say.named_examples: "ask Zinsser", "what would Ogilvy say", "ask Say with Schwartz and Cheng"

fund.label: Fund
fund.description: Panel for money — fundraising, investing, capital allocation, wealth, leverage.
fund.trigger_use: Use when the question is "how do I raise / invest / build wealth?"
fund.named_examples: "ask Naval", "what would Andreessen say", "ask Fund with Graham and Thiel"
